## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Linked Issues

- Related to #

## Validation

- [ ] `make test-backend`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run test`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Other relevant checks:

## Screenshots or Recordings

- If this change affects UI or UX, add screenshots or a short recording.

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes included and documented below

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] No docs update needed
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Docs follow-up issue created

## Reviewer Notes

- Any migration notes, rollout concerns, or areas where feedback is especially useful.
